text: As people rely more and more on technology to solve problems, the ability of humans to think for themselves will surely deteriorate.
To understand the most important characteristics of a society, one must study its major cities.
Educational institutions should actively encourage their students to choose fields of study that will prepare them for lucrative careers.

The following appeared in a memo from the director of a student hotline at a local university. 'Last year, the number of students who called the hotline increased by 20 percent. This shows that students are more stressed than ever before and that the university should increase funding for the hotline.'

The following appeared in an editorial in a business magazine. 'In order to survive, a business must minimize its costs. Therefore, all businesses should move their operations to countries where labor costs are low.'
